'''Neece''' was a [[Rutan/Legends|Rutan]] prison employee. He controlled the entries into this prison. Three of these entries were [[Qui-Gon Jinn/Legends|Qui-Gon Jinn]], [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]] [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]], and [[Drenna]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Jedi Apprentice: The Shattered Peace]]'' {{1st}}
